summary: Completed frontend testing of three UI fixes: Tools menu consolidation, solid dialog backgrounds, and cross-track labels row implementation. All testable features working correctly.
passed_tests: Tools menu opens and shows Timeline Settings and Export JSON options
Timeline Settings modal opens from Tools menu with solid background
Export JSON is accessible and functional from Tools menu
Edit Timeline modal has solid gradient background (not transparent)
Add Event modal has solid gradient background (not transparent)
Theme switching between Fantasy and Sci-Fi works correctly
Timeline loads and displays events properly
Zoom controls are present and functional
